title: Albert Miao
text:
Albert Miao is a PhD Student at the University of Cambridge. He’s studying AI interpretability through the lens of feature decomposition and learning dynamics.
He’s doing his best.

University of Cambridge
Oct 2024 - Current
PhD in Computer Science


University of California, San Diego
Sept 2019 - March 2024
B.S. in Data Science, B.A. in Music
Minors in Philosophy and Mathematics

title: Homepage
text: Code and encoded data for “Features Emerge as Discrete States” is currently being cleaned up. It should be ready by March 10th.
